understood_request: Compare each product's ERP unit cost (from sat_product_details) against the average purchase price paid in procurement (from po_lines unit price), and rank products by markup (unit_cost minus avg purchase price, and markup percentage). Requires a new lnk_product_purchase_order and sat_po_line_details to capture per-product purchase pricing from procurement.po_lines.

vault.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lnk_product_purchase_order (
  product_purchase_order_hk VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY,
  product_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  purchase_order_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  load_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  record_source VARCHAR NOT NULL
)
vault.load_sql:
INSERT INTO lnk_product_purchase_order
SELECT DISTINCT
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.product_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.po_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS product_purchase_order_hk,
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.product_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS product_hk,
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.po_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS purchase_order_hk,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS load_dts,
  'procurement.po_lines' AS record_source
FROM stg_procurement_po_lines s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM lnk_product_purchase_order l
  WHERE l.product_purchase_order_hk = md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.product_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.po_id AS VARCHAR))))
)

vault.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sat_po_line_details (
  product_purchase_order_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  load_dts TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  load_end_dts TIMESTAMP,
  record_source VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  hashdiff VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  line_id BIGINT,
  qty_ordered BIGINT,
  unit_price DOUBLE,
  qty_received BIGINT,
  qty_rejected BIGINT,
  qty_stocked BIGINT,
  due_date TIMESTAMP
)
vault.load_sql:
INSERT INTO sat_po_line_details
SELECT DISTINCT
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.product_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.po_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS product_purchase_order_hk,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS load_dts,
  NULL AS load_end_dts,
  'procurement.po_lines' AS record_source,
  md5(
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.line_id AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.qty_ordered AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.unit_price AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.qty_received AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.qty_rejected AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.qty_stocked AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.due_date AS VARCHAR), '')))
  ) AS hashdiff,
  s.line_id,
  s.qty_ordered,
  s.unit_price,
  s.qty_received,
  s.qty_rejected,
  s.qty_stocked,
  s.due_date
FROM stg_procurement_po_lines s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM sat_po_line_details sat
  WHERE sat.product_purchase_order_hk = md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.product_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.po_id AS VARCHAR))))
  AND sat.hashdiff = md5(
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.line_id AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.qty_ordered AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.unit_price AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.qty_received AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.qty_rejected AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.qty_stocked AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.due_date AS VARCHAR), '')))
  )
  AND sat.load_end_dts IS NULL
)

mart.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mart_product_cost_vs_purchase_price (
  product_bk VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  product_name VARCHAR,
  sku VARCHAR,
  product_line VARCHAR,
  product_class VARCHAR,
  unit_cost BIGINT,
  avg_purchase_price DOUBLE,
  markup_amount DOUBLE,
  markup_pct DOUBLE,
  mart_insert_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
mart.populate_sql:
DELETE FROM mart_product_cost_vs_purchase_price;
INSERT INTO mart_product_cost_vs_purchase_price
SELECT
  hp.product_bk,
  spd.product_name,
  spd.sku,
  spd.product_line,
  spd.product_class,
  spd.unit_cost,
  AVG(spol.unit_price) AS avg_purchase_price,
  ROUND(CAST(spd.unit_cost AS DOUBLE) - COALESCE(AVG(spol.unit_price), 0), 4) AS markup_amount,
  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(AVG(spol.unit_price), 0) > 0
      THEN (CAST(spd.unit_cost AS DOUBLE) - AVG(spol.unit_price)) / AVG(spol.unit_price) * 100
      ELSE NULL
    END,
    2
  ) AS markup_pct,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS mart_insert_dts
FROM
  hub_product hp
  INNER JOIN sat_product_details spd ON hp.product_hk = spd.product_hk AND spd.load_end_dts IS NULL
  LEFT JOIN lnk_product_purchase_order lppo ON hp.product_hk = lppo.product_hk
  LEFT JOIN sat_po_line_details spol ON lppo.product_purchase_order_hk = spol.product_purchase_order_hk AND spol.load_end_dts IS NULL
GROUP BY
  hp.product_hk,
  hp.product_bk,
  spd.product_name,
  spd.sku,
  spd.product_line,
  spd.product_class,
  spd.unit_cost

columns: ROUND(CASE WHEN avg_purchase_price > 0 THEN (unit_cost - avg_purchase_price) / avg_purchase_price * 100 ELSE NULL END, 2) AS markup_pct
